excluded: existing score sheets or summary tables
evidence_scope.basis: Scores use only API-observable structured chart metadata, chart-data previews, SQL text, and query result rows.

representative_task_scores.notes: Expected chart set exists, but metric grounding is partial because the loan-size scatter is aggregated as AVG loan amount by age/gender.
1996/1997 totals, counts, averages, and decomposition are supported by SQL rows; total percentage change is not explicitly computed.
Identifies the largest absolute SIPO-share deviation and includes district, region, salary, and unemployment profile fields.

caveats: Dashboard layout_legibility and render_and_screenshot were intentionally capped at partial credit because the allowed evidence excludes screenshots and screenshot manifests.

Analysis and RCA artifacts are mostly SQL result rows rather than narrative reports, so observation/hypothesis separation and actionable-concise dimensions receive limited credit even when the data query is correct.
Scores do not use any existing score sheets, summary tables, PNG evidence, screenshot manifests, dashboard screenshot evidence markdown, or ablation summary files.
